benefits.benefit_desc: Ju Hua, or Chrysanthemum morifolium, reduces inflammation by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines and enzymes, thus providing relief in various inflammatory conditions. The main active constituents responsible for this benefit are chrysanthemum acids, flavonoids, and volatile oils. The flower heads of the plant contain the highest concentration of these active compounds. The most common medicinal preparations include dried flowers for tea, tinctures, and powdered extracts. This benefit of Chrysanthemum morifolium is particularly helpful in relieving inflammation associated with conditions such as arthritis, dermatitis, and respiratory infections.

Ju Hua, or Chrysanthemum morifolium, alleviates headaches, meaning it can help reduce the pain and discomfort associated with them. The main active constituents of Ju Hua that contribute to this benefit are flavonoids, volatile oils, and various types of bitter glycosides. The primary parts of the Chrysanthemum morifolium plant that provide this benefit are the flowers, which contain the highest concentration of active compounds. The main medicinal preparations of Chrysanthemum morifolium that give this benefit include teas, tinctures, and powdered extracts. This benefit of Chrysanthemum morifolium is particularly helpful for relieving headaches caused by stress, eye strain, and hypertension.

Ju Hua, or Chrysanthemum morifolium, improves vision by reducing eye inflammation and preventing the damage of eye cells, thereby enhancing overall eye health. The main active constituents that contribute to this benefit are flavonoids, volatile oils, and various types of antioxidants. The primary parts of the Chrysanthemum morifolium plant that provide this vision-boosting effect are the flowers, which contain high levels of these beneficial compounds. The main medicinal preparations of Ju Hua that give this benefit include dried flower buds, which can be steeped in hot water to make a nourishing tea, as well as extracts and tinctures. This benefit of Chrysanthemum morifolium is particularly helpful for individuals who suffer from eye-related conditions such as computer vision syndrome, eye strain, and inflammatory eye conditions.

Ju Hua, or Chrysanthemum morifolium, lowers blood pressure, meaning it can help reduce high blood pressure levels and promote healthy blood pressure. The main active constituents in Chrysanthemum morifolium that contribute to this benefit are choline, betaine, and various flavonoids such as luteolin and apigenin. The primary parts of the Chrysanthemum morifolium plant that provide this benefit are the flowers, which contain the highest concentration of active compounds. The main medicinal preparations of Chrysanthemum morifolium that give this benefit include dried flowers for tea or decoctions, liquid extracts, and powdered extracts. This benefit of Chrysanthemum morifolium helps relieve health conditions such as hypertension, atherosclerosis, and other cardiovascular diseases.

Ju Hua, or Chrysanthemum morifolium, reduces anxiety, meaning it can help to alleviate feelings of worry, nervousness, or apprehension. The main active constituents of Chrysanthemum morifolium that contribute to this benefit include flavonoids, volatile oils, and various terpenes. The primary parts of the Chrysanthemum morifolium plant that have anxiety-reducing properties are the flowers, which are often used to make teas, tinctures, and extracts. The main medicinal preparations of Chrysanthemum morifolium that are used to reduce anxiety include dried flower preparations, liquid extracts, and powdered extracts. This benefit of Chrysanthemum morifolium is particularly helpful for individuals who experience anxiety-related symptoms such as restlessness, insomnia, and elevated heart rate.

Ju Hua, or Chrysanthemum morifolium, boosts the immune system by stimulating the production of white blood cells and increasing the body's resistance to infections. The main active constituents that contribute to this benefit are flavonoids, volatile oils, and polysaccharides. The primary parts of the Chrysanthemum morifolium plant that provide this benefit are the flowers. The main medicinal preparations of Chrysanthemum morifolium that give this benefit include teas, decoctions, and tinctures. This benefit of Chrysanthemum morifolium helps relieve health conditions such as colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, as well as providing overall immune support.

Ju Hua, or Chrysanthemum morifolium, clears toxins from the body, particularly from the blood and liver, helping to restore normal physiological functions and maintain overall health. The main active constituents in Ju Hua that contribute to its detoxifying effect are choline, adenine, vitamin B1, B2, and B3, and various flavonoids such as luteolin, quercetin, and apigenin. The primary parts of the Chrysanthemum morifolium plant that possess this benefit are the flower heads, which contain the highest concentration of active compounds. The main medicinal preparations of Chrysanthemum morifolium that provide this benefit include decoctions, infusions, and powdered extracts, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or tinctures. This benefit of Chrysanthemum morifolium is particularly helpful in relieving health conditions associated with toxin buildup, such as skin disorders, digestive issues, and liver dysfunction.

Ju Hua, or Chrysanthemum morifolium, eases menstrual cramps, meaning it may help alleviate the pain and discomfort experienced during menstruation. The main active constituents of Chrysanthemum morifolium that contribute to this benefit are choline, beta-sitosterol, and various flavonoids such as luteolin and apigenin. The primary parts of the Chrysanthemum morifolium plant that provide this benefit are the flower heads. The main medicinal preparations of Chrysanthemum morifolium that give this benefit include dried flowers for infusions or decoctions, and powdered extracts in capsules or tablets. This benefit of Chrysanthemum morifolium helps relieve the main health conditions of menstrual cramps, dysmenorrhea, and pelvic pain associated with menstruation.

Ju Hua, or Chrysanthemum morifolium, regulates body temperature, meaning it helps maintain the body's internal heat balance and can help reduce symptoms of heat-related illnesses. The main active constituents in Ju Hua that contribute to this benefit are flavonoids, volatile oils, and various types of bitter glycosides. The primary parts of the Chrysanthemum morifolium plant used for this benefit are the flower heads. The main medicinal preparations of Chrysanthemum morifolium that provide this benefit are teas, tinctures, and powdered extracts. This benefit of regulating body temperature helps relieve health conditions such as fever, hot flashes, and other symptoms related to excessive heat in the body.

Ju Hua, or Chrysanthemum morifolium, promotes skin health by supporting the overall appearance and integrity of the skin. The main active constituents of Ju Hua that contribute to this benefit include flavonoids, volatile oils, and various types of acids such as caffeic, chlorogenic, and oleanolic acids. The primary parts of the Chrysanthemum morifolium plant that are used for promoting skin health are the flowers, which are rich in the beneficial compounds. The main medicinal preparations of Chrysanthemum morifolium that are used for promoting skin health include infusions, decoctions, and powdered extracts. This benefit of Ju Hua is particularly helpful in relieving skin conditions such as acne, dermatitis, and other inflammatory skin conditions, as well as promoting skin rejuvenation and reducing the signs of aging.
